Safeplay

Settings

How Safeplay behaves while you watch YouTube.

Safeplay removes moderate language by muting it.

Filtering
Filter strength
Censor method
Behavior
Turn on for every video automatically
As soon as a video starts, Safeplay scans its captions and mutes bad words. No button to press.
Ask before spending credits on each video
When on, new videos briefly pause to show the credit cost before filtering. Cached videos never prompt.
Remember videos you've filtered before
If you've already filtered a video, Safeplay turns on automatically the next time you watch it — no credits used.
Show tick marks on the video timeline
Red ticks on the YouTube progress bar show exactly where words will be muted, so nothing takes you by surprise.

Your word lists

Teach Safeplay about names, nicknames, or slang it wouldn't know on its own.

Your word lists
Safeplay already knows thousands of bad words. Use these lists for the ones it doesn't — or for words it hides that you'd rather keep. One word or phrase per line.
Always mute these 0
Never mute these 0

Billing & credits

See what you've used and buy more credits when you need them.

Usage this month
—
Change plan
—
Videos filtered
—
Avg per video
—
Words muted
—
What's a credit? One credit filters roughly one minute of video. You're only charged the first time you filter a video — rewatching, rewinding, and scrubbing are free. Videos you just watch without filtering cost nothing.
Top up credits
Need more credits before your plan resets? Buy a one-time pack — credits stack on top of your monthly allowance and kick in only after it's used up.
Credits never expire Shared across your family Used only after your monthly credits

Account

Who's signed in and who they share credits with.

Signed in
—
—
Sign out of Safeplay
Your settings stay saved. You can sign back in anytime.
Sign in to sync your settings
Your word lists, strictness, and credits sync across devices when you're signed in.

Advanced

Power-user controls. Most people can leave these alone.

Fine-tune mute timing
Safeplay mutes each bad word a split-second before it's spoken and unmutes just after. Adjust if mutes feel too early or late on your setup.
ms
ms
Saved captions (0 videos)
Safeplay keeps captions for videos you've already filtered, so they start instantly the next time — no credits, no wait. Clearing this is safe: captions re-download as you watch and won't cost extra credits.
Changes save automatically.
